summary: Iteration 70: Pixel-Perfect Login Page Rebuild - ALL 11 SCENARIOS PASSED. The Lovable design spec has been successfully implemented with all UI elements, dark/light mode toggle, form validation, error handling, authentication flows, and navigation working correctly.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Login page pixel-perfect rebuild verified. All data-testid attributes present: login-page, back-button, theme-toggle, spet-icon, email-input, password-input, forgot-password-link, login-button, login-error, signup-link. CSS classes .gradient-text and .btn-premium working correctly. Icon size 200x200 with 44px border-radius verified. Theme toggle switches between dark/light mode properly. Error handling shows 'Invalid credentials' in red alert box.

Scenario 1: UI Elements.details: All elements verified: back-button, theme-toggle, spet-icon (200x200, rounded-[44px]), Welcome back, Sign in to your account, email-input, password-input, forgot-password-link, login-button (btn-premium class), signup-link, Don't have an account? text

Scenario 2: Dark Mode.details: Dark theme verified: background rgb(3,4,7), purple button rgb(116,68,228), dark input backgrounds

Scenario 3: Light Mode Toggle.details: Theme toggle switches to light mode: background rgb(245,247,249)

Scenario 4: Dark Mode Toggle Back.details: Theme toggle returns to dark mode: background rgb(3,4,7)

Scenario 5: Empty Form Validation.details: HTML5 validation prevents empty submission with 'Please fill out this field' message

Scenario 6: Wrong Credentials Error.details: Error message 'Invalid credentials' displayed in red alert box (rgb(207,48,48))

Scenario 9: CEO Login → /ceo.details: Login with garcia.rapha2@gmail.com / 12345 redirects to /ceo Executive Overview dashboard

Scenario 10: CEO Logout → /login (same d.details: Logout from /ceo redirects to /login ON SAME EMERGENT DOMAIN (not external)

design_verification.fonts: Space Grotesk for headings, Inter for body ✓
